description_long: This is an upright piano with a dark, weathered wooden exterior, featuring a rectangular body and ornate paneling on the front and sides. The keyboard consists of alternating white and black keys, with visible wear and discoloration, suggesting frequent use or age. The front panel above the keys is solid and unadorned, while the lower section is open, exposing the pedals and some of the internal structure. The piano has three metallic pedals at the base, and the top lid is fully closed, covering the upper mechanism. The wood grain is visible throughout, with a matte, slightly rough finish and some signs of scuffing and aging. No brand or logo is visible, and there is no music stand present on the piano.
description: A dark, weathered upright piano with a closed lid, worn keys, and three visible pedals. The wood exterior is matte and aged, with no visible brand or music stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, ornate paneling, and three pedals beneath the open lower section.
description_view_1: Front-side angle highlighting the keyboard, pedal area, and the depth of the piano's body.
description_view_2: Rear-side view displaying the solid, unadorned back and the piano's overall boxy shape.
description_view_3: Back corner view emphasizing the plain rear panel and the thickness of the wooden structure.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard with approximately 52 white keys and 36 black keys in alternating groups, typical of a full-size upright piano.
